Real Estate Selling Despite

A NEW $4,000 BLOCK

pages.raw_text:
With the leaping of real estate
values in business and residence
property alike, no other section OF
Spokane today is conceded future
Of equal brilliance with that OF the
east side, commonly called Union
Park. A canvass of the business
houses, including real estate ana
banking interests of this section 81
the city this week, indicates that
realty values have increased all the
way from 25 to 80 per cent here in
the last 10 or IL months.


MUCH BUILDING GOING ON.


Business blocks, shops and resi-
dences are being built and a con-
siderable amount of property is
being transferred In different parts
of the Union Park section, despite
the lull that customarily falls over
the city at this season of the year.
Investors declare that no other
part of the city holds out as many
promises to them as this district,
which they look upon as the future
thrifty industrial section of the
CITY Beautiful"


INVESTORS POOL INTERESTS.


In number of instances it Is
found that investors of moderate
means are pooling their money and
buying promising business. property
on East Sprague avenue with their
combined cash, and the outlook Is
apparently good for the early ses-t
Establishment of shops and factories
in various parts of the east side,
in convenient reach of the railroads
and the general trend of traffic. !


In the neighborhood of 100000 is
reported to have been expended in
the construction of an elegant two
story brick building, just being
completed at the southwest corner
of Pittsburg street and Sprague
avenue. 1t is the property of Mr..
McNab of the McNab Drug COM
pany, is strictly modern through
out, and is one of the best in the
whole east end. The store room.
directly on the corner has been
leased by the Spindler Candy COM
pany, and an elaborate candy shop
and refreshment parlor is being
fitted up there.
